greetingTitle.id: MA MAFDA "BESTARI" Belajar, Berprestasi dan Menginspirasi.
greetingTitle.en: Serve with Sincerity, Work with Data

greetingBody.id: Madrasah Aliyah Mafatihul Huda Cipari ( MA MAFDA)  berkomitmen untuk menjadi lembaga pendidikan Islam yang unggul dan berkarakter. Melalui tagline BESTARI (Belajar, Berprestasi, dan Menginspirasi), kami bertekad menanamkan semangat belajar sepanjang hayat, menumbuhkan prestasi akademik dan non-akademik, serta membentuk generasi yang mampu memberi inspirasi bagi masyarakat.
greetingBody.en: Madrasah Aliyah Mafatihul Huda Cipari (MA MAFDA) is committed to becoming a leading and character-driven Islamic educational institution. Through our tagline BESTARI (Learning, Achieving, and Inspiring), we are determined to instill a lifelong love of learning, foster both academic and non-academic achievements, and shape a generation that can inspire the community.

ctaDesc.id: Hubungi Kementerian Agama atau kunjungi PTSP terdekat. Kami siap melayani.
ctaDesc.en: Contact the Ministry of Religious Affairs or visit the nearest one-stop office. We are ready to serve.
